query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_reserve (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trust_id INT,
  source_type ENUM('service_revenue', 'donation', 'investment', 'other') NOT NULL,
  source_reference VARCHAR(255),
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'transferred', 'released') DEFAULT 'pending',
  transfer_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_reserve (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trust_id INT,
  source_type ENUM('service_revenue', 'donation', 'investment', 'other') NOT NULL,
  source_reference VARCHAR(255),
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'transferred', 'released') DEFAULT 'pending',
  transfer_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
